## Resource

Name:
URL:
Topic:
Resource type: course / tutorial / book / YouTube video or playlist / docs / tool / other

## Cost

- [ ] Free
- [ ] Free audit
- [ ] Free materials
- [ ] Mixed
- [ ] Compute/API/cloud may cost
- [ ] Library/Paid book

## Why It Belongs

Who is this for?

What does it teach?

Why is it better than nearby alternatives already listed?

Please write this in your own words. Do not paste marketing copy or an unedited
AI-generated summary.

## Affiliation

Do you sell, market, work for, receive affiliate revenue from, or otherwise have
a financial relationship with this resource?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes, and I have explained the relationship below

Disclosure:

## Quality Check

- [ ] The link works.
- [ ] The resource is not already listed.
- [ ] The prerequisites are clear.
- [ ] The free/paid status is clear.
- [ ] The material is current or still technically relevant.
- [ ] The description is human-written, specific, and not marketing copy.
- [ ] This is not a promotional submission for a paid course, bootcamp,
      coaching program, newsletter, community, app, or subscription.
- [ ] This does not use affiliate, referral, coupon, or tracking links.
- [ ] If this is a YouTube resource, it is educational on its own and not mainly
      a funnel into a paid product.
